summary: Project has authentication and profile issues. Fixing backend: Internet Identity auth flow, account initialization, profile save permissions, and full Signup→Login→Profile Save→Dashboard flow.
architectural_notes: Authentication is Internet Identity only (passkeys, Google, Apple, Microsoft) — no email/password support on this platform
known_issues: Failed to initialize account on login (Internet Identity flow broken)
Failed to save profile (database permissions issue)

existing_features.title: Ensure the complete user flow works end-to-end: Internet Identity login → account initialization → profile save → dashboard. The frontend AuthPage must correctly handle the response from `registerOrLogin` and route the user to profile setup if incomplete, or to the dashboard if complete. The ProfilePage must successfully submit updates and redirect to the dashboard.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix Internet Identity auth flow and account initialization on first login
Fix database permissions so authenticated users can create and update their profile
Ensure full flow works: Login → Profile Save → Dashboard

Fix the backend Internet Identity authentication flow so that a user's account is correctly initialized on first login. The `registerOrLogin` function must reliably create a new user record when none exists for the caller's principal, and return the existing record on subsequent logins without throwing or returning an error variant.

Fix backend database permissions so that an authenticated user can create and update their own profile. The `saveProfile` (or equivalent update) function must correctly validate that the caller's principal matches the profile being written, and persist the changes to stable storage.
